case_title: HARINDERPAL AHLUWALIA VS. JESSADA SILAKOT ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-28-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HARINDERPAL AHLUWALIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JESSADA SILAKOT IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KAREN GOLDSTEIN (CLAIM EXAMINER). NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT JESSADA SILAKOT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS FOR CONTINUANCE TO TRY TO SERVE JESSADA SILAKOT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS FILED ON GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2023 - CONTINUED DEFENDANT WILL NOT ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM TO SEP-07-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HARINDERPAL AHLUWALIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JESSADA SILAKOT IS NOT PRESENT. GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROBERTA WELLS (CLAIMS ADJUSTER) VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
